entry.em: ..HEAT ADVISORY IN EFFECT UNTIL 11 AM CDT THIS MORNING
entry.data: EXTREME HEAT WARNING IN EFFECT FROM 11 AM THIS MORNING TO 7 PM CDT THIS EVENING

MOSTLY SUNNY WITH A SLIGHT CHANCE OF SHOWERS
A SLIGHT CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS THIS AFTERNOON
HOT WITH HIGHS IN THE MID 90S
SOUTHWEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH, BECOMING NORTHWEST THIS AFTERNOON
CHANCE OF RAIN 20 PERCENT
HIGHEST HEAT INDEX READINGS HEAT INDEX READINGS UP TO 107 THIS AFTERNOON

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE UPPER 60S
NORTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S
NORTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S
NORTHEAST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

SUNNY
HIGHS AROUND 80
NORTHEAST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S

PARTLY SUNNY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S
CHANCE OF RAIN 30 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE MID 60S

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 80S

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE UPPER 60S

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 90S

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE LOWER 70S

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE MID 90S
